CustomField.description: Algorithmic validator to run after regex match. Supported values: LUHN (credit cards), IBAN_MOD97 (IBAN checksums), SSN_INVALID (SSN invalid-set blocking), ABA_CHECKSUM (ABA routing numbers). Leave blank for no additional validation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Supported values: LUHN (credit/debit cards), IBAN_MOD97 (IBAN bank accounts), SSN_INVALID (blocks known-invalid SSNs like 000-xx-xxxx), ABA_CHECKSUM (ABA routing numbers). Leave blank if no validation needed.
CustomField.label: Validator Type
